response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development, with experience in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures. They have worked with AI-driven development and have hands-on experience with relevant technologies.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong background in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures
Proficient in multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: Limited direct experience in AI-native engineering environments
No explicit mention of experience with LLM, ML, or AI products
